title: Amtech P3396 150mm (6") Aluminium roofer's square
features: EASY TO READ: This aluminium roofer's square has an easy to read scale that allows you to quickly find any angle from 0 – 180 degrees
VERSATILE: The 90 degree and 45 degree square includes a handy 150mm (6") rule for quick measurements and scribing
DURABLE: Made from strong die cast aluminium, it is ideal for marking the correct angles on common rafters, purlins, hips and valley roofing timbers
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
TIME SAVING: Enhances productivity through fast and accurate cutting
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your gardening requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your outdoor living area looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Square See more
